# Adawatak (أدواتك) — Free Online Tools Platform
> https://adwatak.cloud

Adawatak (أدواتك) is a free online tools platform with 60+ tools in Arabic, English, Turkish, and Indonesian. All tools run client-side in the browser — no signup, no uploads, fully private.

## Tool Categories
- Financial Calculators: mortgage, loan, EMI, salary, VAT, profit margin, installment, compound interest, gold, currency converter
- Health Calculators: BMI, BMR, calorie, body fat
- Islamic Tools: Zakat calculator, inheritance calculator (Faraid), prayer times, Qibla direction, Hijri date converter
- Text Tools: word counter, text case converter, text cleaner, text compare, AI content detector, plagiarism checker, grammar checker, paraphrasing tool, typing speed test, Arabic Lorem Ipsum
- Image Tools: image resizer, image compressor, background remover, image to PDF, YouTube thumbnail downloader, image to text (OCR)
- PDF Tools: PDF merger, PDF compressor, PDF splitter, PDF to Word
- Converters: unit converter, color converter, number to words, Base64 encoder, hash generator, barcode generator
- Generators: QR code generator, QR code reader, password generator, random number, bio generator, invoice generator, WhatsApp link

## Featured Tools (English)
- Mortgage Calculator: https://adwatak.cloud/en/tools/mortgage-calculator
- BMI Calculator: https://adwatak.cloud/en/tools/bmi-calculator
- Zakat Calculator: https://adwatak.cloud/en/tools/zakat-calculator
- QR Code Generator: https://adwatak.cloud/en/tools/qr-generator
- Prayer Times: https://adwatak.cloud/en/tools/prayer-times
- Inheritance Calculator: https://adwatak.cloud/en/tools/inheritance-calculator
- Hijri Converter: https://adwatak.cloud/en/tools/hijri-converter
- Currency Converter: https://adwatak.cloud/en/tools/currency-converter
- VAT Calculator: https://adwatak.cloud/en/tools/vat-calculator

## Multilingual
- Arabic (العربية): https://adwatak.cloud/
- English: https://adwatak.cloud/en
- Turkish (Türkçe): https://adwatak.cloud/tr
- Indonesian (Bahasa Indonesia): https://adwatak.cloud/id

## Blog
- English blog: https://adwatak.cloud/en/blog
- Arabic blog: https://adwatak.cloud/blog

## Key Attributes
- All tools are 100% free
- No registration or signup required
- Privacy-first: all calculations run in-browser, no data sent to servers
- Works offline (PWA)
- 4 languages: Arabic, English, Turkish, Indonesian
- Mobile-friendly responsive design
- Structured data: WebApplication, FAQPage, HowTo, Speakable, BreadcrumbList on every tool page

## About
Adawatak (أدواتك) serves users across the Arab world and globally. Built with Next.js, deployed on Vercel.
Contact: contact@adwatak.cloud
